experience.title: CEO
experience.description: As the Chief Executive Officer of Infomed, the premier Medical Portal in Israel and a subsidiary of Migdal Insurance Company, I am entrusted with steering the organization's overall leadership and business development to not only achieve our objectives but also surpass them. My responsibilities encompass devising and executing the company's business and marketing strategies, fostering innovation through both online and offline channels (recipient of the Webi2012 award), and supervising various divisions such as sales, marketing, finance, technology, product development, new media, internet, mobile and applications, public relations, customer service, and operations. I have played a pivotal role in streamlining work processes and architecting a marketing strategy that effectively utilizes owned, earned, and paid media to fuel business expansion and attain our targets. Furthermore, I have adeptly forged strategic alliances, participated in and secured tenders, thereby ensuring sustained growth and prosperity for the organization. My proven expertise in overarching leadership, business development, and marketing strategy has consistently contributed to the growth and success of the business. I am fervent about harnessing my abilities to propel digital transformation and innovation within the healthcare sector. I remain committed to partnering with teams in order to conceive and execute inventive solutions that surpass customer expectations and stimulate business expansion.

experience.title: Director Of Global Communication Digital Channels
experience.description: As the head of Teva's Global Marketing and Communications Digital team, I am committed to enhancing engagement with both internal and external stakeholders while executing Teva's brand strategy across digital platforms. Key accomplishments in this role include: • Implementing innovative channels and engagement capabilities to foster meaningful connections • Spearheading groundbreaking initiatives in Teva's digital landscape to maintain a competitive edge • Establishing and overseeing Teva's Digital Center of Excellence to streamline digital efforts • Collaborating with local teams and business units to co-develop and implement policies and guidelines, optimizing the use of digital communication channels • Employing multi-channel marketing and communication strategies to effectively convey corporate messages to stakeholders

experience.title: Head Of Digital

As a key driver of this initiative, I am responsible for devising and implementing a cutting-edge digital marketing strategy tailored to the specific needs of Teva's Israeli subsidiary.

experience.title: Chief Digital Officer (CDO) Europe
experience.description: As the Chief Digital Officer (CDO) for Leonardo Hotels in Europe, the European arm of the Fattal Hotel Group with a presence in Israel and Europe with over 250 hotels in 110+ destinations, I am responsible for driving the company's growth through the implementation of revenue-boosting strategies across digital channels, e-commerce, and user experience optimization. Leveraging my expertise in funnel optimization, marketing automation, and engagement strategies, I also utilize Generative AI to achieve more efficient work and meet business needs. By utilizing data-driven insights and marketing automation, we can design targeted user journeys and touchpoints that increase conversions and create a positive, holistic experience for our guests. I am passionate about utilizing my skills to drive digital transformation within the hospitality industry, and I am dedicated to collaborating with teams to design and implement innovative solutions that exceed customer expectations and drive business growth.

linkedin_profile.headline: VP operations The Hoxton - Ennismore - Global Hospitality Leader - Strategic Leadership in Lifestyle Operations - Inspiring Inclusive & Diverse Leaders
linkedin_profile.about: I am a dynamic executive leader with over 20 years of experience in hospitality, known for my strategic vision and ability to drive transformation across operations, commercial strategy, and financial disciplines. My leadership journey began at Harvey Nichols, where I repositioned the hospitality experience, setting a foundation for innovation and guest-centric service. I then shaped the global F&B strategy for London & Regional Hotels, applying strategic insight to maximize performance across diverse portfolios. At Four Corners Hospitality, I served as F&B Vice President, overseeing key operational initiatives and driving transformative growth. I later transitioned to citizenM, managing the European portfolio before stepping into the role of Co-COO, where I led operational excellence, team empowerment, and financial success. Now, as VP of Operations for The Hoxton and Working From_, I blend strategic thinking, entrepreneurial spirit, and a people-first approach to create seamless operations, foster innovation, and enhance culture. The Hoxton and Working From_ are part of Ennismore, a global hospitality collective recognized for its founder-driven brands and commitment to creativity and community.
